description: OpenID Foundation is a standards organization focused on open identity and authorization specifications such as OpenID Connect, OAuth-related profiles, federation, and digital credentials. Its website publishes specifications, working-group information, and certification program materials.
summary: openid.net exposes documentation and specification pages for identity standards and certification, but no public developer integration surface on openid.net itself was found: no HTTP/REST API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI endpoint hosted on openid.net.
